ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_oid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "locus_tag" TEXT /* Locus tag for the gene */,
  "desc" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "desc_orig" TEXT /* Original description of the gene */,
  "taxon_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the taxon the gene belongs to */,
  "taxon_display_name" TEXT /* Display name of the taxon */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Batch ID for data upload */,
  "scaffold_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the scaffold the gene is part of */,
  "gene_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the gene */,
  "gene_length" INTEGER /* Length of the gene sequence */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the gene sequence */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the gene data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_oid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_taxon_oid FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_oid") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_oid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_scaffold_oid FOREIGN KEY ("scaffold_oid") REFERENCES scaffolds ("scaffold_oid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxa" (
  "taxon_oid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxon */,
  "taxon_display_name" TEXT /* Display name of the taxon */,
  "taxon_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the taxon (species, genus, family, etc.) */,
  "parent_taxon_oid" INTEGER /* Parent taxon OID */,
  "taxon_acronym" TEXT /* Acronym of the taxon */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the taxon */,
  "genetic_code" INTEGER /* Genetic code used by the taxon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_oid")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the batch */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scaffolds" (
  "scaffold_oid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scaffold */,
  "scaffold_name" TEXT /* Name of the scaffold */,
  "assembly_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the assembly the scaffold belongs to */,
  "scaffold_length" INTEGER /* Length of the scaffold */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the scaffold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scaffold_oid")
)

CREATE TABLE "assemblies" (
  "assembly_oid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly */,
  "assembly_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly */,
  "assembly_type" TEXT /* Type of assembly (e.g. genome, transcriptome) */,
  "assembly_date" TEXT /* Date when the assembly was created */,
  "assembly_method" TEXT /* Method used for assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_oid")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_oid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "protein_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the protein */,
  "gene_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene that encodes the protein */,
  "protein_length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "isoelectric_point" REAL /* Isoelectric point of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_oid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_gene_oid FOREIGN KEY ("gene_oid") REFERENCES genes ("gene_oid")
)

CREATE TABLE "structures" (
  "structure_oid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structure */,
  "structure_name" TEXT /* Name of the structure */,
  "structure_type" TEXT /* Type of structure (e.g. crystal, NMR) */,
  "protein_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the protein that the structure belongs to */,
  "structure_resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the structure */,
  "structure_method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_oid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structures_protein_oid FOREIGN KEY ("protein_oid") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_oid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "gene_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene being accessed */,
  "protein_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the protein being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g. view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_protein_oid FOREIGN KEY ("protein_oid") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_oid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_oid FOREIGN KEY ("gene_oid") REFERENCES genes ("gene_oid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene being annotated */,
  "protein_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the protein being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g. functional, structural) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_gene_oid FOREIGN KEY ("gene_oid") REFERENCES genes ("gene_oid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_protein_oid FOREIGN KEY ("protein_oid") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_oid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., FASTA, GenBank, PDB) */,
  "gene_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene */,
  "protein_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the protein */,
  "structure_oid" INTEGER /* Reference to the structure */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the file was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_structure_oid FOREIGN KEY ("structure_oid") REFERENCES structures ("structure_oid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_gene_oid FOREIGN KEY ("gene_oid") REFERENCES genes ("gene_oid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_protein_oid FOREIGN KEY ("protein_oid") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_oid")
)
